Dashboard.notConfiguredDesc: The dashboard is powered by Metabase, but the connection hasn't been configured yet. Please follow the setup instructions in the documentation to start your local Metabase server and connect it to your database.
Dashboard.errorDesc: We couldn't generate a secure URL for the Metabase dashboard.

Topics.title: Topics
Topics.description: Manage and organize your assessment topics.
Topics.listDesc: All available topics in the workspace.
Topics.noTopics: No topics found. Create your first topic to get started.
Topics.name: Name
Topics.createDesc: Add a new topic category for questions and assessments.
Topics.deleteDesc: Warning: If you delete this topic, all child resources (Questions, Question Banks, and Assessments) will be deleted too. This action cannot be undone.

Banks.title: Question Banks
Banks.integrateDesc: Embed the Question Banks library into your application to allow users to browse and author assessment content.
Banks.bankLibraryDesc: Search, scan metadata, and jump into bank-specific authoring workflows.
Banks.noBanksDesc: No question banks match the current search or topic filter.
Banks.noBanksAvailDesc: Question banks will appear here once they are added.

Questions.title: Questions
Questions.noQuestionsDesc: No questions match the current search or filters.
Questions.noQuestionsAvailDesc: Questions will appear here once they are added.
